name: Black Bean and Cheese Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Fat-free Monterey Jack, cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To make the sauce, cook green onions and garlic in oil until tender. Add tomatillos, green chilies, cilantro, and oregano. Continue cooking until the sauce comes to a boil; reduce heat to low and continue cooking about 10 minutes.
3. Pour the sauce into a blender container. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.
4. Return the blended sauce to the saucepan and stir in chicken broth. Cook over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
5. Dip each tortilla into the sauce. Spoon about 1 1/2 tablespoons of black beans and 2 tablespoons of cheese onto each tortilla.
6. Roll the tortilla around the filling, seam side down.
7. Place the rolled tortillas in a 13-inch x 9-inch baking dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
8. Pour any remaining sauce over the tortillas; sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes until the cheese is melted and the filling is hot.
